body_txt: When nuclear radiation isn't just the source of your strength, it is your strength. Characters with an Atomic Superpower have their powers themed around various atomic phenomena such as radiation, nuclear energy, or quantum mechanics. Expect lots of flashy, high-energy abilities like Hand Blasts , Deflector Shields , and Sphere of Destruction explosions that all strangely resemble models of an atom, complete with orbiting particles and supercharged Kirby Dots . Abilities such as these tend to be incredibly powerful and may be wielded recklessly. Compare Radiation-Induced Superpowers , for when nuclear radiation is simply the source of one's powers— the two can overlap, but often don't — and Light 'em Up (light is really just a specific band of radiation). This is not to be confused with a powerful country with nuclear weapons .
